description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed collar and with graphic on the frontFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoUnleash cricket fury with this white cricket demon tee from adidas. The stark black and red graphic on the chest is brought to life with silver accents and captures the controlled fury of the game. Team this up with jeans and adidas shoes for casual outings with friends.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
